zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin於大約1035年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內時，他的父親Manassès de Dammartin-en-Goële42歲，母親Constance de France31歲。他和Countess Rohese de Bulles至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1103年在他的家鄉享年69歲，埋葬在法國豪-德-福朗斯奧易沙吉洛-德也瑟倫特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin于大约1035年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內时，他的父亲Manassès de Dammartin-en-Goële42岁，母亲Constance de France31岁。他和Countess Rohese de Bulles至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1103年在他的家乡享年69岁，埋葬在法国豪-德-福朗斯奧易沙吉洛-德也瑟倫特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin was born about 1035, in Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, his father, Manassès de Dammartin-en-Goële, was 42 and his mother, Constance de France, was 31. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Countess Rohese de Bulles. He died in 1103, in his hometown, at the age of 69, and was buried in Saint-Leu-d'Esserent, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin est né environ 1035, à Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, son père, Manassès de Dammartin-en-Goële, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Constance de France, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Countess Rohese de Bulles. Il est décédé en 1103, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Leu-d'Esserent, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin um 1035 in Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Manassès de Dammartin-en-Goële 42 und seine Mutter Constance de France 31. Er hatte mit Countess Rohese de Bulles mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1103 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Saint-Leu-d'Esserent, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin è nato il circa 1035 nel Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Manassès de Dammartin-en-Goële, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Constance de France, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Countess Rohese de Bulles. Morì nel 1103, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Leu-d'Esserent, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartinが約1035年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンで生まれた時，父Manassès de Dammartin-en-Goëleは42歳，母Constance de Franceは31歳であった。彼はCountess Rohese de Bullesとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1103年に故郷で69歳で死去し，フランスハウトス-デ-フランスオイゼサイント-レウ-ド'エセレントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin(이)가 대략 1035년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-트-마니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Manassès de Dammartin-en-Goële(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance de France(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Countess Rohese de Bulles(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1103년 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 이스 세인트-레우-드'세렌트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin nasceu aproximadamente 1035, em Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Manassès de Dammartin-en-Goële, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Constance de France, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Countess Rohese de Bulles. Ele faleceu em 1103, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Leu-d'Esserent, Oise, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin родился около 1035 г. в местности сине-ет-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Manassès de Dammartin-en-Goële было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Constance de France, 31. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Countess Rohese de Bulles. Он умер в 1103 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-леу-д'ессирент, оис, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugues I de Montdidier Comte de Dammartin nació aproximadamente 1035, en Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Manassès de Dammartin-en-Goële, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Constance de France, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Countess Rohese de Bulles. Murió en 1103, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Leu-d'Esserent, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
